package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerAsyncConcurrencyGoroutinePerItemWithoutWorkerLimit() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_async_concurrency_goroutine_per_item_without_worker_limit"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Async and concurrency. Flag unbounded goroutine-per-item fanout without a semaphore or worker pool."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
